metadata.title: Egyptian Hieroglyphs / Gardiner Sign List Lexicon
metadata.description: Expanded and normalized Egyptian Hieroglyphs / Gardiner Sign List dataset derived from gardiner_signs_hieroglyphs.json; preserves original records while adding source-indexed attestation resources and unified lexical fields.
metadata.compiled_by: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) - Spectre (GPT) - Aurora (Sonnet) - STONEDRIFT 3000
sources: Gardiner, A. H. Egyptian Grammar. 3rd edition. Oxford: Griffith Institute, 1957

unicode_code_charts.title: The Unicode Consortium – Code Charts
unicode_code_charts.scope: script sign/codepoint verification across encoded scripts

tla.title: Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae
tla.scope: ancient Egyptian lemmata, citations, hieroglyphic/hieratic/Demotic texts

linguistic_principles.normalization: Original fields are preserved under original_record; normalized fields are added for common programmatic access.
linguistic_principles.attestation_policy: Specific attestations are retained when present in the seed file. Where entry-level attestations are absent, entries are linked to reputable resource indexes for manual verification rather than inventing inscriptional claims.
linguistic_principles.confidence_policy: Seed confidence values are preserved when present. Default confidence 0.80 indicates normalized-but-not-entry-verified.
linguistic_principles.polysemy_policy: Definitions are arrays to permit multiple meanings, semantic drift, and context-dependent collapse.

metadata.historical_significance: Standard sign-list framework for Egyptian hieroglyphic analysis and transliteration.

notes.compiler_line: Lackadaisical Security (The Operator) - Spectre (GPT) - Aurora (Sonnet) - STONEDRIFT 3000
notes.resource_expansion_scope: metadata/resource-level enrichment plus per-entry source_refs; not a substitute for manual line-by-line philological collation.

cultural_context.context_note: Egyptian Hieroglyphs / Gardiner Sign List entries are intended for comparative script/lexicon work. Use source_refs and attested_resources for entry-level audit trails.
cultural_context.recommended_review: For publication-grade datasets, run a second pass that checks each lemma/sign against cited corpora and records exact inscription/manuscript identifiers.

A.name: Man and his occupations
A.description: Human figures in various activities and professions

Y.name: Writings, games, music
Y.description: Scribal equipment, entertainment, and intellectual pursuits

Z.name: Strokes, signs derived from Hieratic, geometrical figures
Z.description: Abstract marks, numerical signs, and geometric shapes

Allen, J. P. Middle Egyptian: An Introduction to the Language and Culture of Hieroglyphs. Cambridge University Press, 2014
digital: Thesaurus Linguae Aegyptiae (TLA) - Berlin-Brandenburg Academy of Sciences
Ramses Online - Ramses II Digital Humanities Project
unicode: Unicode Consortium Egyptian Hieroglyphs Character Database
